alerts.title: DHS CR EXPIRED: FEMA BRIC funding at risk
alerts.detail: The DHS Continuing Resolution expired on 2026-02-13. FEMA BRIC (FEMA) may be affected by the funding lapse. 20 days since expiration.

alerts.title: DHS CR EXPIRED: FEMA Tribal Mitigation Plans funding at risk
alerts.detail: The DHS Continuing Resolution expired on 2026-02-13. FEMA Tribal Mitigation Plans (FEMA) may be affected by the funding lapse. 20 days since expiration.

alerts.title: Reconciliation threat: To provide for reconciliation pursuant to section 2002 of the concurrent resolut
alerts.detail: Active bill detected in Congress.gov that may threaten IRA Section 6417 (Elective Pay). Bill: To provide for reconciliation pursuant to section 2002 of the concurrent resolution on the budget for fiscal year 2016.. Source ID: 114-HR-3762. This is an active legislative threat -- not the already-enacted OBBBA.

alerts.title: Reconciliation threat: Acknowledging oppression, forced eviction, and suffering experienced by tens of
alerts.detail: Active bill detected in Congress.gov that may threaten IRA Section 6417 (Elective Pay). Bill: Acknowledging oppression, forced eviction, and suffering experienced by tens of thousands of Bhutanese citizens during the late 1980s and early 1990s, and encouraging steps toward justice, reconciliation, and lasting peace.. Source ID: 119-HRES-1093. This is an active legislative threat -- not the already-enacted OBBBA.

alerts.title: IIJA fund-exhaustion: USDA Wildfire Defense Grants -- expires when funds exhausted
alerts.detail: USDA Wildfire Defense Grants is funded under auth_iija_wildfire with 'expires when funds exhausted' durability. No fixed calendar deadline, but IIJA one-time allocation is finite. Monitor fund obligation rates for depletion signals.
